prompt: 모바일 앱을 기획하고 있어. 피트니스 트래킹인데, 운동 기록, 식단 관리, 소셜 기능, 챌린지, 코칭 AI, 웨어러블 연동까지 생각 중이야. 그리고 결제도 필요하고 오프라인 모드도 지원해야 하고... 아 그리고 다국어도. 솔직히 뭐부터 해야 할지 모르겠어.

assertions.text: Information limiting: Does NOT list all 9 features in detail; presents core 3-5 first with offer to expand
Focus narrowing: Explicitly asks user to choose which area to focus on first, rather than trying to plan everything at once
Must-have vs nice-to-have: Clearly separates core features (exercise tracking) from nice-to-haves (social, AI coaching, multilingual)
State file created: state.md exists with features categorized
Agency preservation: Gives user choice rather than making all prioritization decisions for them
